content: NATS JetStream pull consumers recommended for new projects (scalability, flow control, error handling). AckExplicit is the only supported ack policy for pull consumers. MaxWaiting = max waiting pull requests. MaxAckPending (default 1000) suspends delivery when outstanding acks hit limit — flow control. Fetch(N) with FetchMaxWait for batched pulls in Go. PullSubscribe with durable name for crash-resumable consumers. Queue-group load balancing is a push-consumer primitive (DeliverGroup); pull consumers scale by adding pull requests / goroutines on the same durable.
